unsuccessful.description: The rules that the operation couldn't update.

id.description: The ID of the access log subscription.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the access log subscription.

resourceId.description: The ID of the service network or service.

resourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service network or service.

serviceNetworkLogType.description: The type of log that monitors your Amazon VPC Lattice service networks.

destinationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the log destination.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the listener.

serviceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource configuration.

resourceGatewayId.description: The ID of the resource gateway associated with the resource configuration.

resourceConfigurationGroupId.description: The ID of the parent resource configuration of type GROUP.

type.description:
The type of resource configuration. A resource configuration can be one of the following types:

  • SINGLE - A single resource.

  • GROUP - A group of resources. You must create a group resource configuration before you create a child resource configuration.

  • CHILD - A single resource that is part of a group resource configuration.

  • ARN - An Amazon Web Services resource.

status.description: The current status of the resource configuration.

resourceConfigurationDefinition.description:
Identifies the resource configuration in one of the following ways:

  • Amazon Resource Name (ARN) - Supported resource-types that are provisioned by Amazon Web Services services, such as RDS databases, can be identified by their ARN.

  • Domain name - Any domain name that is publicly resolvable.

  • IP address - For IPv4 and IPv6, only IP addresses in the VPC are supported.

allowAssociationToShareableServiceNetwor.description: Specifies whether the resource configuration can be associated with a sharable service network.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the resource configuration was created, in ISO-8601 format.

customDomainName.description: The custom domain name for your resource configuration.

groupDomain.description: (GROUP) The group domain for a group resource configuration. Any domains that you create for the child resource are subdomains of the group domain. Child resources inherit the verification status of the domain.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource gateway.

subnetIds.description: The IDs of the resource gateway subnets.

securityGroupIds.description: The IDs of the security groups for the resource gateway.

ipAddressType.description: The type of IP address for the resource gateway.

ipv4AddressesPerEni.description: The number of IPv4 addresses in each ENI for the resource gateway.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the rule.

match.description: The rule match. The RuleMatch must be an HttpMatch. This means that the rule should be an exact match on HTTP constraints which are made up of the HTTP method, path, and header.

priority.description: The priority assigned to the rule. The lower the priority number the higher the priority.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service.

customDomainName.description: The custom domain name of the service.

certificateArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the certificate.

status.description: The status. If the status is CREATE_FAILED, you must delete and recreate the service.

dnsEntry.description: The public DNS name of the service.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service network.

sharingConfig.description: Specifies if the service network is enabled for sharing.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the association.

createdBy.description: The ID of the account that created the association.

privateDnsEnabled.description: Indicates if private DNS is is enabled for the service network resource association.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the association.

customDomainName.description: The custom domain name of the service.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the association.

privateDnsEnabled.description: Indicates if private DNS is enabled for the VPC association.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the target group.

status.description: The status. You can retry the operation if the status is CREATE_FAILED. However, if you retry it while the status is CREATE_IN_PROGRESS, there is no change in the status.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the association.

resourceConfigurationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource configuration associated with the VPC endpoint of type resource.

vpcEndpointId.description: The ID of the resource VPC endpoint that is associated with the resource configuration.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource gateway.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service.

status.description: The status. You can retry the operation if the status is DELETE_FAILED. However, if you retry it while the status is DELETE_IN_PROGRESS, the status doesn't change.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the association.

status.description: The status. You can retry the operation if the status is DELETE_FAILED. However, if you retry it when the status is DELETE_IN_PROGRESS, there is no change in the status.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the association.

status.description: The status. You can retry the operation if the status is DELETE_FAILED. However, if you retry it while the status is DELETE_IN_PROGRESS, there is no change in the status.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the association.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the target group.

status.description: The status. You can retry the operation if the status is DELETE_FAILED. However, if you retry it while the status is DELETE_IN_PROGRESS, the status doesn't change.

unsuccessful.description: The targets that the operation couldn't deregister.

policy.description: The auth policy. The policy string in JSON must not contain newlines or blank lines.

state.description: The state of the auth policy. The auth policy is only active when the auth type is set to AWS_IAM. If you provide a policy, then authentication and authorization decisions are made based on this policy and the client's IAM policy. If the Auth type is NONE, then, any auth policy that you provide remains inactive. For more information, see Create a service network in the Amazon VPC Lattice User Guide.

id.description: The ID of the domain verification.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the domain verification.

status.description: The current status of the domain verification process.

txtMethodConfig.description: The TXT record configuration used for domain verification.

id.description: The ID of the access log subscription.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the access log subscription.

resourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the access log subscription.

destinationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the access log destination.

resourceGatewayId.description: The ID of the resource gateway associated with the resource configuration.

resourceConfigurationGroupId.description: The ID of the group resource configuration.

type.description:
The type of resource configuration.

  • SINGLE - A single resource.

  • GROUP - A group of resources.

  • CHILD - A single resource that is part of a group resource configuration.

  • ARN - An Amazon Web Services resource.

portRanges.description: The TCP port ranges that a consumer can use to access a resource configuration. You can separate port ranges with a comma. Example: 1-65535 or 1,2,22-30

allowAssociationToShareableServiceNetwor.description: Indicates whether to add the resource configuration to service networks that are shared with other accounts.

protocol.description: The TCP protocol accepted by the specified resource configuration.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource gateway.

vpcId.description: The ID of the VPC for the resource gateway.

subnetIds.description: The IDs of the VPC subnets for the resource gateway.

securityGroupIds.description: The IDs of the security groups associated with the resource gateway.

ipAddressType.description: The type of IP address used by the resource gateway.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the listener.

isDefault.description: Indicates whether this is the default rule.

action.description: Information about the action for the specified listener rule.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service.

customDomainName.description: The custom domain name of the service.

certificateArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the certificate.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the service network.

status.description: The status. You can retry the operation if the status is DELETE_FAILED. However, if you retry it while the status is DELETE_IN_PROGRESS, there is no change in the status.
